title: Summary: Turn 733
content:
**Memory Distillation**  
Complex instructions like “explain entire system architecture with code paths” do not crash the LLM but degrade predictably: attention sparsity, fact confusion, pattern collapse, truncation. For Pueblo, a 3-layer architecture (CLI → InputRouter → CommandDispatcher/AgentTaskRunner, persistence, desktop) was outlined with accurate core module details (~70% reliability on inferred parts). Optimal strategy: ask layered, file-focused questions (1–2 files per turn) to maintain high accuracy.
